---
title: "Research"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: publications
    contents: publications
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    template: _pub-listing.ejs
    fields: [title, author, year, venue, url, links]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
  - id: working-papers
    contents: working-papers
    sort: "order asc"
    type: default
    template: _pub-listing.ejs
    fields: [title, author, status, venue, url, links]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
---

## Journal Publications

::: {#publications}
:::

## Working Papers

::: {#working-papers}
:::
